name: British Ingredients
recipeInstructions:
1. Single cream is equivalent to light cream.
2. Double cream is the same as whipping cream.
3. Lyle's Golden Syrup is similar to Light Karo Syrup.
4. Treacle is molasses.
5. Castor sugar is super-fine granulated sugar.
6. Demerara sugar is brown sugar.
7. Mixed spice can be substituted with pumpkin pie spice.
8. Dark cooking chocolate is equivalent to semi-sweet chocolate.
9. Digestive biscuits are the same as graham crackers.
10. Plain flour is all-purpose flour.
11. Strong flour is bread flour.
12. Sultanas are seedless white raisins.
13. Morello cherries are pie cherries.
14. Tomato puree is similar to tomato paste.
15. Courgettes are zucchini.
16. Aubergines are eggplant.
17. Haricot beans are navy beans.
18. Swedes are turnips.
19. Gammon is ham.
20. Streaky bacon can be American bacon, Canadian bacon, or ham.
